title: Paid in Full

actors: Robert Cummings, Lizabeth Scott, Diana Lynn
plot: Jane Langley has always done all she can for her selfish sibling Nancy. After both sisters fall in love with handsome Bill Prentice, Jane graciously steps aside. Relationships among all three are further complicated when the now-m...
